prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger** (86mm compressor, 1.4 bar peak boost) paired with a **Polestar-specific 86mm billet compressor wheel** for the **P5-8AT** (8-speed Aisin automatic) variant of the **Volvo P8 AWD platform’s 4.0L twin-turbo V8 (B8444T4)** to achieve 950whp on E85 with a **Motec M150 ECU** reflash and **Bosch Motorsport 2,200cc injectors**

Full **Titanium exhaust system by Akrapović** with 3.5-inch mandrel-bent piping, **valved X-pipe**, and **dual 100mm carbon-fiber tips**, reducing backpressure by 38% while maintaining OEM catalytic converter compliance for emissions testing

Custom **PWR Australia 42-row front-mount intercooler** (1,200hp capacity) with **CNC-machined billet end tanks** and **bar-and-plate core** (4.5-inch thick), paired with a **HPS silicone 4-ply charge piping kit** and **Tial Q 50mm blow-off valves** to eliminate heat soak at sustained 2.2 bar boost levels
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Polestar 5-specific carbon-fiber fenders, 30mm extended rear quarters, and aggressive front splitter with **Gurney flaps**) paired with **custom 3D-printed ABS underbody diffusers** for a 45% increase in downforce at 180mph

**OEM+ carbon-fiber hood** by **Seibon** with **functional NACA ducts** (directing airflow to the **PWR intercooler**) and **hidden LED daytime running lights** integrated into the grille, replacing the stock Polestar emblem with a **laser-etched titanium badge**

**BBS CI-R 20x10.5 ET25 (front) and 20x12 ET35 (rear) forged wheels** in **matt bronze finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 315/25 R20 rear)**, paired with **AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers** clamping **380mm two-piece rotors** with **J-Hook slotted patterns**
